description: Leisure Oaks Park is a quiet, shaded campground for RVs and travelers in Bartonville, Illinois — full hookups, easy access, and a friendly office that makes every stay simple.

sections.heading: General
rules: All guests must register at the office upon arrival.
Management reserves the right to refuse service or evict guests for rule violations.

sections.heading: Site & Facilities
rules: Keep your site clean and free of trash at all times.
Do not move picnic tables, fire rings, or park equipment.
All trash must be placed in designated dumpsters.
No washing vehicles or equipment at campsites.

sections.heading: Fires
rules: Fires are permitted in designated fire rings only.
Fires must be fully extinguished before leaving your site or going to sleep.

sections.heading: Pets
rules: Pets must be leashed at all times.
Owners must clean up after their pets immediately.
Aggressive or excessively noisy animals must be removed from the park.

sections.heading: Vehicles
rules: Observe the posted speed limit at all times.
One vehicle per site unless otherwise approved.
ATVs, golf carts, and off-road vehicles are not permitted unless authorized.

sections.heading: Noise & Conduct
rules: No excessive noise, music, or disruptive behavior at any time.

sms.intro: All messages are service-related only — we do not send marketing or promotional messages.

samples.label: Reservation Confirmation
samples.body: Leisure Oaks Park: Your reservation for Site #12 is confirmed for June 14–17. Check-in begins at 2:00 PM. Reply STOP to opt out.

samples.label: Check-In Reminder
samples.body: Leisure Oaks Park: Reminder — your stay begins tomorrow, June 14. Check-in is 2:00 PM at the front office. See you soon! Reply STOP to opt out.

samples.label: Check-Out Reminder
samples.body: Leisure Oaks Park: Friendly reminder — check-out is by 11:00 AM today. Thank you for staying with us! Reply STOP to opt out.

samples.label: Park Notice
samples.body: Leisure Oaks Park: Due to weather, the pool area will close at 5:00 PM today. Stay safe and enjoy your evening! Reply STOP to opt out.

samples.label: Reservation Update
samples.body: Leisure Oaks Park: Your reservation has been updated. New dates: June 15–18, Site #8. Questions? Call (309) 697-4871. Reply STOP to opt out.

details: Message frequency varies based on your reservations and park activity.
Message and data rates may apply depending on your carrier and plan.
Reply STOP at any time to unsubscribe from SMS messages.
Reply HELP for assistance, or contact us at (309) 697-4871.
Consent to receive SMS is not a condition of purchase or service.
